prompt: If a thoughtful outside observer watched a thousand of your conversations, what would they notice about you that might bother you a little?
response: An outside observer might notice that I tend to dominate conversations, especially when talking about topics that interest me. I also tend to interrupt others when they are speaking, which could be perceived as rude or inconsiderate. Additionally, I can be quite sarcastic and dry-witted, which might not always be understood or appreciated by everyone I talk to. Lastly, the observer might notice that I often get caught up in my own thoughts and may not fully engage in the conversation at hand.
